idea_summary: Reduced WARP_N from 128 to 64 to double CTA count

1p2c warp specialization with TILE_M=128 for doubled consumer parallelism
5 pipeline stages with TILE_K=32 did not help
1p3c warp specialization with TILE_M=192 for triple compute parallelism
1p3c with 4 pipeline stages for better latency hiding
Persistent 1p3c kernel did not help due to tile iteration overhead
1p2c with 5 stages hurt - too much shared memory (155KB)
WN=128 TM=128 for larger N tile
1p2c with WARP_N=128 for wider output tiles
1p3c with WARP_N=192 for wider output - SMEM overflow
1p3c with 5 stages - more SMEM, less occupancy
1p1c with TILE_M=64 and 8 stages - low compute intensity
1p4c with TILE_M=256 - only 64 CTAs underutilizes GPU
1p2c with TILE_M=128 and 5 stages - not enough consumers
